_comment: GuyTalk Brief — Issue Data Schema v1.0
_workflow: Fill this JSON each morning, then paste content into /brief/issue-00X/index.html using the template.
_future: A generator script can read this JSON and auto-produce the HTML. Current setup is manual for speed.
title: Both series tied. Scheffler leads at The Memorial. Weekend's stacked.
deck: Five minutes. Everything you need going into the weekend.

tldr.text: Knicks-Cavs ECF tied 1-1. Game 3 Saturday at MSG. Mitchell vs Brunson, round three.
Thunder-Spurs WCF tied 1-1. Wemby stole Game 2. Game 3 in San Antonio Saturday.
S&P +0.8% on the week. NVDA holding near $1,080. Memorial Day week = light volume ahead.
Scottie Scheffler leads The Memorial at Muirfield Village through Round 2. Watch Sunday.
Weekend watch list: one show, one movie, and the brand everyone's wearing at the course.

stories.headline: ECF tied 1-1. Brunson owned Game 1. Mitchell answered in Game 2.
stories.angle: Mitchell's 7/22 in Game 1 is the number to remember. He's never gone back-to-back bad in a series. Game 2 confirmed that.

stories.headline: Wemby stole Game 2 in OKC. Series tied heading to San Antonio.
stories.angle: San Antonio hasn't hosted a WCF game since 2017. The AT&T Center will be the loudest building in the country Saturday night.

markets.week_summary: S&P +0.8%. NVDA holding. Memorial Day volume warning.
markets.key_story: Light data week. Consumer confidence Wednesday is the main watch. Memorial Day week historically runs 25% below normal volume — don't overweight moves.

golf.venue: Muirfield Village Golf Club · Dublin, OH
golf.leaderboard_placeholder: REPLACE WITH ACTUAL LEADERBOARD BEFORE PUBLISH

culture.headline: Jensen Huang on building Nvidia: the full Tim Ferriss interview
culture.body: 3.5 hours, worth 3x speed. The part about surviving near-bankruptcy in the 90s is the part your group chat will quote. Huang's framework for how to hire — 'Give people projects they can't finish' — is the one line that'll stick.
culture.angle: If you run anything, watch it. If you don't, watch it anyway.

culture.headline: REPLACE: Add this week's actual viral story here
culture.body: REPLACE: 2-3 sentences in GuyTalk voice. What happened, why people care, what the correct read is. No hot takes for the sake of it.
culture.angle: REPLACE: One line your reader can use in conversation.

culture.headline: Memorial Day weekend: what's worth your time
culture.body: REPLACE: Add the actual Netflix/HBO/etc. drop for this weekend. One show, one movie, one sentence each.

the_rec.title: 18Birdies — the only golf app worth keeping on your phone
the_rec.body: GPS rangefinder, stat tracking, digital scorecard, and a handicap system that actually works. The free tier is legitimately good — you don't need the paid version unless you're obsessive. Download it before your next round and you'll wonder why you didn't have it earlier.

sections.sharp_take: Both Conference Finals are tied at 1. Scheffler's chasing another major trophy on Sunday. It's Memorial Day weekend. This is the most sport per square inch of any three-day stretch before July 4th. Clear Saturday afternoon. If someone asks you to do something else, the answer is no.
